title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at United India Insurance

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at United India Insurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, United India Insurance in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About United India Insurance:
United India Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with United India Insurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
